decisions.rationale: IR re-read (ir/inventory.json style_ref rows) confirms ai_RNbBHYXz→Group_card_, ai_RNbBHYYB→Text_heading_2_, ai_RNbBHYYC→Text_small_, ai_RNbBHYYG→Dropdown_default_; SettingsNotificationsTab uses Group_card_muted_, Text_heading_3_, Text_body_muted_, and Input_default_ on SelectTrigger whereas SettingsProfileTab already applies the correct IR tokens for the same card/header pattern. Valid ui-fidelity gap on named decompose ui_refs and review ui_evidence is partial (not fail) on Xz/B/C/G; criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3, functional_audit FV-1..FV-3, and functional_ok all pass. AC-2 gates dropdown choice text and static copy (resolved in B-1 rewrite), not style_ref presentation. No downstream item lists SET-06 in depends_on. ~4-line token swap in SettingsNotificationsTab.tsx batchable with SET-02/SET-04 settings visual-parity deferrals under DS-01 — defer to settings IR style_ref polish wave.

IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHYYE (notifications-freq-group) is a Group child of ai_RNbBHYYD wrapping ai_RNbBHYYF label and ai_RNbBHYYG dropdown, and ai_RNbBHYYL save button parent_element_id is ai_RNbBHYYD (sibling of YYE, not card root). Implementation flattens YYE (label+select marked directly on YYD div) and mounts save button as card sibling outside YYD. Valid hierarchy/marker gap on decompose ui_ref ai_RNbBHYYE (review ui_evidence fail) and partial on YYD nesting; AC-1 gates data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHYXz, ai_RNbBHYYA, and ai_RNbBHYYD only — YYE is ui_refs-listed but not AC-required. Save workflow (AC-3/FV-2) passes; no module item depends_on SET-06. Add NOTIFICATIONS_FREQ_GROUP_BUBBLE_ID wrapper and nest save button inside YYD (~8-line SettingsNotificationsTab.tsx change) batchable with SET-02 C-1 bubble-id marker polish — defer to SET-06 IR hierarchy polish.

Coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-B-1-rewrite failures (slug enum, missing title/subtitle/frequency-label markers) although criteria_audit AC-2, functional_audit FV-3, rewrite_verification B-1 resolved, and review ui_evidence now pass on copy, choice strings, and restored B/C/F markers. Coverage-artifact hygiene only — mirrors SET-02 C-3 and SET-04 C-4 deferrals. Refresh cursor-impl-cycle/output/coverage/SET-06-notifications-tab-and-save.json preflight.gaps on the next coverage pass so re-review diffs stay readable.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass, B-1 rewrite resolved. Deferred: C-1 IR style_ref token alignment on card/title/subtitle/dropdown (DS-01 settings visual-parity batch with SET-02/SET-04); C-2 ai_RNbBHYYE freq-group wrapper marker and ai_RNbBHYYL nesting under ai_RNbBHYYD (SET-06 IR hierarchy polish with SET-02 marker batch); C-3 stale coverage preflight.gaps (refresh on next coverage run). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
